title: Prompt to create missing store when using --store
description: When a command is run against a store path that does not yet contain a himitsu store, prompt the user to create it instead of failing or proceeding silently. Prompt text should be: 'No store exists. Create one at <path>? Y/n'. Add tests and validate the CLI behavior.

title: Use short SHA and date in version output
description: Update himitsu version/build info so `himitsu --version` and `himitsu version` show the short commit SHA plus a date, while keeping the existing build.rs formatting changes intact.

title: Fix bd Dolt sync no-common-ancestor failure
description:
During session completion, `bd dolt push` failed with `unknown push error; no common ancestor`.

Retrying after `bd dolt stop`, `dolt checkout config`, `dolt pull origin main`, and restarting the server still left pushes failing.

Investigate the local/remote Dolt history mismatch and restore successful tracker sync.

title: Show commit SHA in version output and add rebuild watcher
description: Update himitsu so --version includes the commit SHA, add a version subcommand alias, and add a Justfile recipe that rebuilds the binary automatically when source files are saved.
